commands.review_summary:
Adds handler-level admin-scope gating for gateway-originated global Active Memory on/off commands and regression tests for blocked write-scoped, allowed admin-scoped, global status, and session toggle paths.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: invoke the Active Memory command handler on current main with `gatewayClientScopes: ["operator.write"]` and `args: "off --global"`; the code reaches `replaceConfigFile` without an admin check. I did not execute it because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because this protected-label external security-hardening PR lacks after-fix real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's setup evidence.
